inputs.label: Total Cloud Spend (Monthly)
inputs.businessContext: Total monthly cloud infrastructure cost across all services.

inputs.label: Average Compute Utilization Rate
inputs.businessContext: Average CPU/memory utilization across all compute instances.

inputs.label: Storage Waste Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Estimated percentage of storage that is orphaned, unused, or over-provisioned.

inputs.label: Idle Resource Count
inputs.businessContext: Number of compute instances that have been idle for more than 7 days.

inputs.label: Monthly Data Transfer Out
inputs.businessContext: Total outbound data transfer volume per month.

inputs.label: Reserved Instance Coverage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of compute spend covered by reserved or savings plans.

inputs.label: Rightsizing Opportunity Score
inputs.businessContext: Aggregate score (0-100) indicating potential savings from instance type adjustments.

inputs.label: Cloud Provider
inputs.businessContext: Primary cloud provider for cost analysis.

inputs.label: Include Network Waste Analysis
inputs.businessContext: Toggle to include network-related waste (e.g., data transfer, load balancer inefficiencies).

rules.message: Extremely low utilization with high spend – immediate rightsizing review recommended.
Storage waste exceeds 50% – initiate storage lifecycle policy.
High number of idle resources – automate shutdown or decommission.
Low reserved instance coverage with high spend – consider purchasing reservations.

formulas.label: Compute Waste Cost
formulas.description: Cost of underutilized compute resources based on utilization gap.

formulas.label: Storage Waste Cost
formulas.description: Cost of wasted storage based on estimated waste percentage.

formulas.label: Idle Resource Cost
formulas.description: Cost of idle compute instances assuming average instance cost.

formulas.label: Network Waste Cost
formulas.description: Cost of unnecessary data transfer (if include_network_waste is true).

formulas.label: Rightsizing Savings Potential
formulas.description: Potential savings from rightsizing based on opportunity score.

formulas.label: Reserved Instance Savings Gap
formulas.description: Additional savings possible by increasing reserved coverage to 60%.

formulas.label: Total Waste Cost (Primary Result)
formulas.description: Aggregate waste cost from all identified waste categories.

primary.label: Total Cloud Waste Cost
primary.description: Total estimated monthly waste cost across compute, storage, idle, and network.

hiddenLossDrivers.description: Unattached EBS volumes or orphaned snapshots incurring costs.
Instances with CPU/memory far above actual workload requirements.
Allocated but unused public IP addresses.
Cross-region or inter-AZ traffic that could be optimized.
Reserved instances that have expired and are running on-demand.

suggestedActions.action: Implement auto-scaling and rightsizing policies for compute instances.
Set up lifecycle policies to delete or archive unused storage volumes.
Automate shutdown of idle resources using scheduling or idle detection.
Increase reserved instance coverage to at least 60% of compute spend.
Review and optimize data transfer paths; use CDN or direct connect where possible.

dataConfidenceAdjusted.label: Total Waste Cost (Confidence Adjusted)
dataConfidenceAdjusted.description: Total waste cost adjusted by a confidence factor based on input completeness and consistency.
